subcodes.first_line: O thou maidservant of God! Thy letter was written in utmost humiliation and supplication, evincing thy prayer and commune to the Kingdom.... ...Say to Percy Grant and Juliet Thompson: O ye intelligent ones, there is no rest or tranquillity in this world.
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power of prayer, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
